mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dining_table (table_number, table_name, seats, status, qr_code, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{tableNumber}, #{tableName}, #{seats}, #{status}, #{qrCode}, #{sort}, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dining_table SET table_number = #{tableNumber}, table_name = #{tableName}, seats = #{seats}, qr_code = #{qrCode}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dining_table SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE dining_table SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM dining_table
AND deleted = 0
AND table_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableNumber}, '%')
AND table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, update_time DESC
